about

My name is beek. If I make something, I'll upload it here.

I'm a creative and tech enthusiast based in Australia. I enjoy building technical projects and creating art, sometimes the two intersect.

You can find me on GitHub and Instagram .

Be excellent to each other.

be excellent to each other.
